nasb.text: And all the people who were in the city were called together to pursue them, and they pursued Joshua and were drawn away from the city.

esv.text: So all the people who were in the city were called together to pursue them, and as they pursued Joshua they were drawn away from the city.

cnv.text: 城裡的眾民都被召集，去追趕他們；艾城的人追趕約書亞的時候，就都被誘離城。

ccb.text: 艾城的人都被召去追赶以色列人，他们都被诱出城。
